params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: organization_id
params.description: Filter by Organization ID (optional). (UUID format)

params.name: project_id
params.description: Filter by Project ID (optional). (UUID format)

params.name: tags
params.description: List of tags to filter on (optional).

params.name: name
params.description: Filter by secret name (optional).

params.name: path
params.description: Filter by exact path (optional).

params.name: ephemeral
params.description: Filter by ephemeral / not ephemeral (optional).

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by secret type (optional).

params.name: scheduled_for_deletion
params.description: Filter by whether the secret was scheduled for deletion / not scheduled for deletion. By default, it will display only not scheduled for deletion secrets.

items.docs: Retrieve the list of secrets created within an Organization and/or Project. You must specify either the `organization_id` or the `project_id` and the `region`.

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

items.docs: Create a secret in a given region specified by the `region` parameter.

info.name: Get metadata using the secret's ID

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret. (UUID format)

items.docs: Retrieve the metadata of a secret specified by the `region` and `secret_id` parameters.

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret. (UUID format)

items.docs: Edit a secret's metadata such as name, tag(s), description and ephemeral policy. The secret to update is specified by the `secret_id` and `region` parameters.

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret. (UUID format)

items.docs: Delete a given secret specified by the `region` and `secret_id` parameters.

info.name: Allow a product to use the secret

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret. (UUID format)

items.docs: Allow a product to use the secret

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret to enable secret protection for. (UUID format)

items.docs: Enable secret protection for a given secret specified by the `secret_id` parameter. Enabling secret protection means that your secret can be read and modified, but it cannot be deleted.

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: (UUID format)

items.docs: Restore a secret and all its versions scheduled for deletion specified by the `region` and `secret_id` parameters.

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret to disable secret protection for. (UUID format)

items.docs: Disable secret protection for a given secret specified by the `secret_id` parameter. Disabling secret protection means that your secret can be read, modified and deleted.

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: (UUID format)

items.docs: Restore a secret's version specified by the `region`, `secret_id` and `revision` parameters.

info.name: Access a secret's version using the secret's name and path

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: revision
params.description:
Version number.
The first version of the secret is numbered 1, and all subsequent revisions augment by 1. Value can be either:
- an integer (the revision number)
- "latest" (the latest revision)
- "latest_enabled" (the latest enabled revision).

params.name: secret_path
params.description: Secret's path.

params.name: secret_name
params.description: Secret's name.

params.name: project_id
params.description: ID of the Project to target. (UUID format)

items.docs: Access sensitive data in a secret's version specified by the `region`, `secret_name`, `secret_path` and `revision` parameters.

info.name: List versions of a secret using the secret's ID

params.name: region
params.description: The region you want to target

params.name: secret_id
params.description: ID of the secret. (UUID format)

params.name: status
params.description: Filter results by status.
